search_queries_used: site:dha.gov.ae abdominal pain adults telehealth guideline PDF Dubai
rejection_reasons: Patient pages are not clinician guidance.
The presentation does not establish a specific diagnosis.
Treatment and dose content was not mapped.
population_applicability: Partial: exact for adults, while the urgent baseline workflow has no adult-only restriction.
setting_applicability: Partial: exact for DHA telehealth and excludes emergency management from virtual care.
UAE_applicability: Direct for Dubai DHA-licensed telehealth; emergency and surgical pathways remain clinician-led.
recency_verification: DHA Issue 2, effective 2024-04-21 and due for revision 2029-02-21, remains the verified registry copy.
superseded_check: No newer official DHA issue was identified on the telehealth portal.

evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Defines adult abdominal-pain use in DHA-licensed telehealth and excludes emergency and controlled-medication scenarios.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped pain history, associated symptoms, exact aliases, presets, and history.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Specifies onset, duration, location, character, severity, associated gastrointestinal, urinary, gynaecological, exposure, travel, trauma, and medical-history domains.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped bleeding, vomiting, worsening pain, fever, pregnancy, guarding, severe pain, syncope, and haemodynamic warning fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Lists sudden or severe pain, fever, vomiting, rigid abdomen, bleeding, weight loss, dysphagia, haematuria, pregnancy, and shock-associated features.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped urinalysis, pregnancy testing, blood tests, and imaging.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Lists blood tests, urinalysis, pregnancy testing, pancreatic enzymes, and imaging selected according to the clinical assessment.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped return and escalation documentation.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Lists specialist and emergency referral criteria for adult abdominal pain.

unresolved_source_gaps: Children and emergency treatment are outside the exact adult telehealth scope.
Broad “abdominal” matching, generic examination fields, diet, analgesia, and fixed follow-up remain unsupported.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
